engine.qc

QC parameter base classes.

class pymetis.engine.qc.parameter.QcParameter[source]

Bases: ParametrizableItem

An encapsulation of a QC parameter, as specified in the DRLD.

value (Any)

property value: Any
classmethod extended_description_line(name=None)[source]

Property
